name: textgrad
prompt:
Here is the role of the variable you will improve: <ROLE>3-layer retrieval pipeline configuration. Modify == CURRENT CONFIG == numeric values to maximise mean 4-metric RAGAS score.</ROLE>.

The variable is the text within the following span: <VARIABLE> == PIPELINE ARCHITECTURE AND CODE WALKTHROUGH ==

This is the full (...) |  gist_lambda: 0.0-1.0
  all min_score / min_similarity: 0.0-2.0 </VARIABLE>

Here is the context and feedback we got for the variable:

<CONTEXT></CONTEXT>

Improve the variable (3-layer retrieval pipeline configuration. Modify == CURRENT CONFIG == numeric values to maximise mean 4-metric RAGAS score.) using the feedback provided in <FEEDBACK> tags.
You must follow the following constraints:

<CONSTRAINTS>Constraint 1: Only change numeric values in == CURRENT CONFIG ==.
Constraint 2: Do not rename or add config keys.
Constraint 3: top_k must be an integer between 3 and 20.
Constraint 4: rrf_k must be an integer between 10 and 120.
Constraint 5: gist_lambda must be a float between 0.0 and 1.0.
Constraint 6: All min_score / min_similarity values must be floats between 0.0 and 2.0.</CONSTRAINTS>

Send the improved variable in the following format:

<IMPROVED_VARIABLE>{the improved variable}</IMPROVED_VARIABLE>

Send ONLY the improved variable between the <IMPROVED_VARIABLE> tags, and nothing else.

name: textgrad
optimizer.response:
<IMPROVED_VARIABLE>== PIPELINE ARCHITECTURE AND CODE WALKTHROUGH ==

This is the full (...) |  gist_lambda: 0.65
  all min_score / min_similarity: 1.25
  top_k: 12
  rrf_k: 60 </IMPROVED_VARIABLE>
